reasoning: Based on Wikipedia as of Oct 26, 2025, Paul Biedermann's 200m freestyle record (1:42.00 from July 2009) still stands. David Popovici, the closest challenger, has a best time of 1:43.13 (1.13 seconds slower) and won 2025 Worlds with 1:43.53 - actually slower than his 2024 best. The record is from the supersuit era and has proven exceptionally durable for 16+ years. With no major competitions scheduled between Oct 2025-Jan 2026 where records typically get broken, the probability remains high for all three dates, though slightly decreasing with the longer time horizon.
